name: DELUGEM800HF

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: AA8D723E-ED3D-4C4A-9DE1-8A8177B6ABAD

comment: Engineered for outdoor performances, the DELUGEM800HF features a powerful 800W white LED source with an impressive 121,000 lux output at 5m (4.5° beam angle) delivering exceptional brightness with a crisp 7,000K colour temperature plus framing to sculpt the beam to create stunning visuals. Versatile colour capabilities include 5-colours colour wheel with CMY colour mixing and CTO colour correction for precise colour control. The rotating gobo wheel plus animation wheel  offer extensive pattern options with indexing and shaking functions for dynamic effects. Control options include 3 and 5 pin dmx as well as RJ45 connection capabilities.

gwSpecs.description: Engineered for outdoor performances, the DELUGEM800HF features a powerful 800W white LED source with an impressive 121,000 lux output at 5m (4.5° beam angle) delivering exceptional brightness with a crisp 7,000K colour temperature plus framing to sculpt the beam to create stunning visuals. Versatile colour capabilities include 5-colours colour wheel with CMY colour mixing and CTO colour correction for precise colour control. The rotating gobo wheel plus animation wheel  offer extensive pattern options with indexing and shaking functions for dynamic effects. Control options include 3 and 5 pin dmx as well as RJ45 connection capabilities.
